Processes applications for naturalization, citizenship, and permanent resident status. 1455 NW Overton Street Suite 1 Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday by appointment (800) 375-5283 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES CITIZENSHIP AND IMMIGRATION SERVICES USCIS FIELD OFFICES
